rules.label: Urgent central evaluation flag
rules.rule: central_neurologic_red_flag_pattern == yes OR posterior(dx_central_positional_mimic) >= safety_threshold OR posterior(dx_central_vestibular_disorder) >= safety_threshold

rules.label: MRI IAC/CPA consideration flag
rules.rule: retrocochlear_cpa_iac_pattern == yes OR posterior(dx_cpa_iac_retrocochlear_mimic) >= moderate_posterior OR posterior(dx_cpa_iac_tumor) >= moderate_posterior
